subcodes.first_line: Blessed art Thou, O my Exalted Lord, and glorified art Thou, O Lord of all creation! Thou hast been sanctified and hallowed above all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارکت یا ربی الاعلی و تعالیت یا رب الوری لقد تنزهت و تقدست عن کل الشئون و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
